display_information.name: Susan
display_information.description: AI Chief of Staff — docs, email, calendar, GitHub issues & PRs from Slack.
display_information.long_description: Susan is your AI Chief of Staff. Type /susan in any channel or thread and she will read the conversation, generate a preview, and execute actions on your behalf — including Google Docs, Gmail, Google Calendar, GitHub issues, and GitHub PRs. All actions require your approval before executing.

slash_commands.description: Ask Susan to act on this channel or thread
slash_commands.usage_hint: help | connect | weekly status [--no-approval] | summarize prs … | create pr … | …
